hero.title: Railway crossing obstacle detection
hero.copy: Upload a crossing frame in the detector panel. It returns a clear safety verdict for the track area.

detector.title: Track detector
detector.safeReason: No obstacle detected on the track area.
detector.dangerReason: Obstacle detected while the crossing area needs attention.

model.title: Model notes
model.copy: Technical details stay here instead of cluttering the first view.

about.title: Detection rules
about.copy: The frontend currently demonstrates the core flow with local state. Backend inference can be added later without changing the page structure.
rules: An obstacle on the track returns a danger verdict.
A clear track returns a safe verdict.
The upload card is the only entry point for image analysis.
